challenges.title: Arrays, Strings, Hashing & Basic Algorithms
challenges.description: Master fundamental DSA: arrays, strings, hash maps, two pointers, sliding window, sorting, binary search, and Big O complexity analysis.

challenges.title: Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues, Trees & Heaps
challenges.description: Master core data structures: linked lists, stacks, queues, binary trees, BST, tree traversals, and heap-based priority queues.

challenges.title: Recursion, Backtracking, DP & Graphs
challenges.description: Master advanced algorithms: recursion, backtracking, dynamic programming, graph traversals (BFS/DFS), shortest paths, and topological sort.
